name: Shai-Hulud / node-gyp worm wave (Jun 2026)
summary: Worm family that evolved from lifecycle scripts to AI-agent SessionStart hooks and IDE folder-open tasks, then to node-gyp build hooks (57 packages in the June wave). Moved faster than known-bad databases could update. SEED LIST — partial; refresh this bundle from the public IOC feed before relying on it.
